name: RC Starter Kit V2
tagline: Full-featured Next.js starter with OTP auth, workspaces, and admin panel
description: A production-ready starter kit for building multi-tenant Next.js applications. Includes passwordless OTP email authentication, collaborative workspaces with role-based access, a superadmin panel with metrics, user onboarding flow, and profile management with image uploads. Designed as a reusable foundation for SaaS products.
highlights: Passwordless OTP authentication with NextAuth.js v5 and Resend
Multi-tenant workspace system with granular roles (Admin/Member)
Superadmin panel with dashboard metrics and user management
User onboarding flow with profile image upload via Vercel Blob
Clean RSC architecture with layered service pattern
